infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: MassIQ reads your steps, sleep, heart rate, and body metrics to calculate your personalized fitness score.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: MassIQ writes workout and nutrition data to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: MassIQ uses motion sensors to track your step count accurately.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MassIQ uses your camera to analyze your meals and body composition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MassIQ accesses your photos to analyze food and body composition photos.

plugins.photosPermission: MassIQ accesses your photos to analyze food and body composition.

plugins.cameraPermission: MassIQ uses your camera to analyze meals and body composition.
